meanings.definition: have a long or continuing effect
examples: The discussions with my teacher reverberated throughout my adult life

meanings.definition: be reflected as heat, sound, or light or shock waves
examples: the waves reverberate as far away as the end of the building

meanings.definition: to throw or bend back (from a surface)
examples: Sound is reflected well in this auditorium

meanings.definition: spring back; spring away from an impact
examples: These particles do not resile but they unite after they collide

meanings.definition: treat, process, heat, melt, or refine in a reverberatory furnace
